## Meeting Purpose

[Review Atlas implementation progress and address team concerns after the first week of transition.](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Most team members need more time to fully explore Atlas capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Atlas is perceived as faster than AirOps, with promising features like AI editing](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Workload distribution and time management concerns exist, particularly for RAMP and article review](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Documentation and context sharing from handoff meetings need improvement](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Implementation Progress

  - [Nika: Working on DataGrid space, learning artifact setup](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Sucheta: Generated one article, experimenting with versions](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [Timmy: Limited Atlas time due to client backlogs (RAMP, DataGrid, Strapi)](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Ismail (absent): Completed 2 RAMP articles, updated artifacts for Prophecy, Galileo, and RAMP](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Atlas User Experience

  - [Faster than AirOps (e.g., 49 seconds for research)](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [AI assistant showing promise, despite some errors](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [UI feedback: lacks color, looks like a code editor](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Promising features: AI editor for tone/content changes](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### Workload and Time Management

  - [Timmy planning weekend work to catch up on Atlas exploration](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Mara to discuss with MEs about restructuring Monday for Atlas deep-dive](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Strapi transition planned for next week, allowing more Atlas practice](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Mariana concerned about the volume of articles to review weekly](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

### Documentation and Context Sharing

  - [Need to distill verbal handoff meeting information into accessible documentation](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Importance of bookmarking shared documents in applicable channels](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Goal: Easier context sharing among team members and potential additional help](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

### Next Steps for Atlas Implementation

  - [Generate 1-5 articles per client through Atlas for next week](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Confirm and adjust artifacts as needed, especially for Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Prioritize DataGrid article generation on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Explore AI assistant capabilities with different prompts](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to discuss with MEs about restructuring Monday for Timmy's Atlas deep-dive](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Team to prioritize DataGrid article generation through Atlas on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Vivek to coordinate Strapi content creation for next week](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Mara to meet with Mariana and Tiandra to address article review workload concerns](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Team to improve documentation and context sharing from handoff meetings](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Implement short-term (freelancer/VA) and long-term solutions for RAMP workload](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Continue exploring and providing feedback on Atlas features and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/5igBzzAfkcLWXpy6zz5sRiiVYwHAti-V?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
